title: Amphione cymosa

The plant is native to tropical Asia and is often found in humid, shaded areas. Amphione cymosa is a terrestrial orchid that grows from a short rhizome and produces small, white flowers. It is a relatively rare and understudied species, but is valued by orchid enthusiasts for its unique and delicate appearance.
